Description: Limited private liability for nuclear accidents and improved insurability for commercial nuclear investment

Event_Name: Yom Kippur War / Arab Oil Embargo
Description: Oil supply disruption increased interest in domestic non-oil electricity sources and strengthened the relative case for nuclear energy

Partial core meltdown sharply reduced public confidence and tightened regulatory scrutiny
Created the federal repository framework but also amplified long-term waste-management uncertainty
Global nuclear disaster intensified anti-nuclear sentiment and safety scrutiny
Focused repository work on Yucca Mountain and deepened political conflict over waste disposal

Event_Name: Nuclear Energy Innovation and Modernization Act
Description: Reformed NRC fee structures and advanced licensing support for next-generation reactors

Event_Name: Bipartisan Infrastructure Law / Civil Nuclear Credit Program
Description: Created a major federal support program to prevent premature reactor shutdowns

Description: Established a zero-emission nuclear production credit and broadened financial support for the sector
